title: aira hawaiiensis
intro: Aira hawaiiensis, also known as Hawaiian hair grass, is a perennial grass native to Hawaii. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Aira hawaiiensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
